req.title: Transaction dispute
req.statement: A customer shall dispute a transaction within 60 days of posting; disputes beyond 60 days shall be rejected.

doc.reasoning: The requirement enforces a 60-day dispute window post-transaction. Test suite covers: (1) valid dispute within window (EP/STC), (2) rejection beyond window (NEG), (3) boundary at exactly 60 days (BVA), and (4) decision logic around age thresholds (DT). All tests target POST /disputes with deterministic transaction age mocking and idempotent setup.

tests.name: test_dispute_valid_within_60_days
tests.executable:
import requests
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_dispute_valid_within_60_days(api_base_url, auth_token):
    txn_id = "TXN-001"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token}"}
    
    # Mock transaction posted 30 days ago
    <setup_transaction_at_age_days>(txn_id, age_days=30)
    
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn_id,
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{api_base_url}/disputes",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in data
    assert data["status"] == "PROVISIONAL_CREDIT_PENDING"
    assert <verify_provisional_credit>(txn_id)

tests.name: test_dispute_rejected_beyond_60_days
trace: R-FIN-009: disputes beyond 60 days shall be rejected
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_dispute_rejected_beyond_60_days(api_base_url, auth_token):
    txn_id = "TXN-002"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token}"}
    
    # Mock transaction posted 75 days ago
    <setup_transaction_at_age_days>(txn_id, age_days=75)
    
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn_id,
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{api_base_url}/disputes",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    data = resp.json()
    assert data["error"] == "DISPUTE_WINDOW_CLOSED"
    assert "60 days" in data["message"]
    assert not <dispute_exists>(txn_id)

tests.name: test_dispute_boundary_exactly_60_days
trace: R-FIN-009: precondition transaction.age < 60d satisfied at boundary
dispute created and provisional credit applied
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_dispute_boundary_exactly_60_days(api_base_url, auth_token):
    txn_id = "TXN-003"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token}"}
    
    # Mock transaction posted exactly 60 days ago
    <setup_transaction_at_age_days>(txn_id, age_days=60)
    
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn_id,
        "reason": "billing_error"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{api_base_url}/disputes",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    data = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in data
    assert <verify_provisional_credit>(txn_id)

tests.name: test_dispute_decision_table_valid_combinations
actions: for each age in [1, 30, 59]: POST /disputes with that transaction
expected: each returns dispute_id and PROVISIONAL_CREDIT_PENDING status
trace: R-FIN-009: decision table coverage of valid age partitions
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_dispute_decision_table_valid_combinations(api_base_url, auth_token):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token}"}
    test_cases = [
        ("TXN-005", 1),
        ("TXN-006", 30),
        ("TXN-007", 59)
    ]
    
    for txn_id, age_days in test_cases:
        <setup_transaction_at_age_days>(txn_id, age_days)
        
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{api_base_url}/disputes",
            json={"transaction_id": txn_id, "reason": "unauthorized"},
            headers=headers
        )
        
        assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Failed for age={age_days}"
        data = resp.json()
        assert "dispute_id" in data
        assert data["status"] == "PROVISIONAL_CREDIT_PENDING"
